summary: Plan-only remediation result for five independent open PRs. No merge is recommended because none has complete merge preflight with resolved bot review state and Codex /review proof. One narrow contributor-branch repair is actionable for #48942; #41892 and #49488 need maintainer/product judgment before automation should proceed.

actions.reason: Broad product feature with incomplete merge proof and unresolved review-bot evidence; job requires human for broad_code_delta and unclear product/design finalization.

Independent dependency maintenance PR with clean relevant checks, but merge preflight lacks Codex /review and explicit review resolution proof.

Useful, narrow contributor PR but not merge-ready. Repair the contributor branch by rebasing/refreshing, verifying current precedence, addressing any still-applicable bot review findings, rerunning narrow tests, and obtaining Codex /review.
Active human changes-requested review plus broad Android compatibility/product support decision. A replacement or repair would require an API 26-30 audit beyond a narrow safe fix artifact.
Create an executable repair plan for #48942 only; other PRs are independent or need human judgment.

needs_human: #41892: broad Control UI feature and linked product/design issue require maintainer decision before automation can merge or replace.
